name: Retro Runner
short_description: Embark on a high-speed adventure in my passion project! Choose from 39 cars and race down vibrant streets while dodging traffic and collecting coins.With a killer synthwave by DavidKBD and an addictive, intuitive gameplay, this game promises a unique atmosphere.Get ready to rev your engines
detailed_description:
Embark on a high-speed adventure in my passion project! Choose from 39 cars and race down vibrant streets while dodging traffic and collecting coins. With a killer synthwave soundtrack by David KBD and an addictive, intuitive gameplay, this game promises a unique atmosphere. Get ready to rev your engines!

- 39 Cars
- Great sound track (thank you David KBD) more comming soon
- Unique atmosphere
- intuitive and addictive
-controls: just smash your A and D keys XD

Boom on itch - ``A pearl in the ocean!!

I love the classic retro style and also it's addictive!

By the way, the controls are so smooth :)``
